changelog: New: Real-time ping display in Live Info card (color-coded)
New: Smart Server Picker — join lowest-ping server (Pro)
New: Low Ping FastFlags preset with 11 network-tuning flags (Pro)
New: DNS pre-cache — 18 Roblox domains pre-resolved on start (Pro)
New: Process Priority Boost for Roblox (Pro)
New: Icon mod now replaces Dock icon + in-game texture with re-signing
Fix: Live Info, Discord, stats now update in real-time (nested observable fix)
Fix: FPS bypass via presets blocked for free users
Fix: Pro mods enforced at runtime, not just UI
Fix: Discord RPC no longer blocks main thread
Fix: Accent color, auto-rejoin, update banner state now persist
